howItWorks.intro: This electricity cost calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Cost
rules.explanation: Watt-hours to kWh times your electric rate.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: HVAC, water heater, dryer, and oven are the biggest consumers.
Use LED bulbs, Energy Star appliances, and run heavy loads off-peak.
